summary: Treasury Guard evidence ledger for outward-facing proof pages. Each record binds a workflow label to a tx hash, the command shape used to produce it, and the proof boundary we are willing to claim.

verificationPolicy.txExistence: Confirmed either by the live settle response captured in the workspace or by the official OKX X Layer explorer page.
verificationPolicy.workflowBinding: Bound to a workflow name only when the workspace has a matching local run summary or an explicit ledger entry.

levels.rerun-today: Re-run on March 9, 2026 during the latest proof pass, with observed command output and tx hash captured together.
levels.historical-workspace-record: Previously validated live run preserved in workspace docs; kept as historical supporting evidence until re-run again.

records.title: Direct BYO Thesis
records.command: OKX_API_KEY=*** OKX_SECRET_KEY=*** OKX_API_PASSPHRASE=*** X402_TEST_PRIVATE_KEY=*** TREASURY_GUARD_PAYMENT_ASSET=USDT npm run premium:real-payment-thesis-smoke
proves: Plain BYO thesis purchases do not trigger provider split.
The real-wallet signer and OKX x402 verify/settle flow still work end to end.

records.title: Live Provider Thesis 20/80
records.command: OKX_API_KEY=*** OKX_SECRET_KEY=*** OKX_API_PASSPHRASE=*** X402_TEST_PRIVATE_KEY=*** TREASURY_GUARD_PAYMENT_ASSET=USDT TREASURY_GUARD_LIVE_ANALYSIS_ADAPTER=okx-http TREASURY_GUARD_LIVE_PROVIDER_ID=provider-brett TREASURY_GUARD_LIVE_PROVIDER_NAME='Brett Signal AI' TREASURY_GUARD_LIVE_PROVIDER_KIND=external TREASURY_GUARD_LIVE_PROVIDER_PAYOUT_ADDRESS=0x7047d5BA9ac1Be6f98d4262BE96D5FfFCe21DAA1 npm run premium:live-demo-thesis
proves: The main live thesis demo path is currently working with OKX HTTP analysis, x402 settlement, and a real wallet signer.
Approved provider metadata still activates the 20% / 80% split mode.

records.title: Trade Plan
proves: The premium trade workflow has completed real settlement before.
Trade is not thesis-only; it has its own live settlement history.

records.title: Exit Plan
proves: The premium exit workflow has completed real settlement before.
Exit is preserved as a separate historical live record until the next re-run.
